'''Petja''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who fought in the [[New Sith Wars]] under the command of [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Kiel Charny]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the final days of the [[Ruusan campaign]], killed through the use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by a [[Darth Zannah/Legends|grief-stricken child]], when he killed her [[Laa (Bouncer)|friend]].<ref name="JvS 5" />

==Biography==
[[File:Zannah_first_kill.jpg|thumb|left|130px|Petja killed by Zannah.]]
A [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of stern resolve, yet idiosyncratic tendencies, Petja preferred to use a standard and somewhat primitive [[Bow/Legends|bow]] in battle, despite the availability of modern [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="JvS 5" />

Petja [[Death/Legends|died]] shortly before the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]], [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-crushed]] by [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Zannah]] after Petja mistakenly killed her companion [[Laa (Bouncer)|Laa]].<ref name="JvS 5" /> After his death, the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Petja (star)|Petja]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]] was named after him.
